narrative:
Precinct Swan Township (precinct in Vinton County) has 598 registered voters, with 49.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 34.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 19.1 percentage points.
